title: centaurea iberica
intro: Centaurea iberica, also known as Iberian cornflower, is a flowering plant species native to the Iberian Peninsula. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health conditions due to its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Centaurea iberica include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. The plant is often prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion for medicinal purposes, and is also used in traditional folk medicine in some regions.
